document.title: Certifications guide
document.subtitle: Universal Enclosures - PanelSeT and ClimaSys ranges
document.sourceLine: Source: UE 2026 Catalogue, Certifications matrix, page 610.
document.footer: CONFIDENTIAL - Schneider Electric Universal Enclosures Laboratories. Unauthorized distribution is not permitted.
notices: Technical changes reserved. Information provided without guarantee. Images are for illustrative purposes only.
For other certifications and declarations of conformity please consult us.

copyBlocks.coverMeta: UE 2026 Catalogue reference - certifications matrix, page 610
copyBlocks.overviewIntro: This guide consolidates the certification matrix for Universal Enclosures into a product-by-product reference. It is designed as an auxiliary document for commercial and technical review, not as a replacement for official certificates or declarations of conformity.
copyBlocks.standardsIntro: The referenced standards are grouped as in the certification matrix. IEC, UL / CSA, EN and ISO use graphic marks; directive and certified-body requirements are listed separately as matrix references.
copyBlocks.bodiesIntro: Only certification bodies with at least one linked product entry are included in the active legend. Laboratorio Oficial J.M. Madariaga is excluded from the active legend because the source matrix contains no associated certified product row.
copyBlocks.catalogueIntro: The catalogue table lists every product or range row in the source matrix, including rows with no listed certification.
copyBlocks.productSheetIntro: Each product sheet shows the family, selected product image, certification bodies, applicable functions, referenced standards, and source notes.
copyBlocks.annexIntro: The annex records source notes, logo and reference treatments, image fallbacks, and integrity checks used to generate the guide.

sections.title: Product catalogue
content: All 29 product rows grouped by family

sections.title: Product sheets
content: Compact detail rows for each product or range

referenceStyle.colorApproach: White background, black text, thin gray rules, sparse Schneider green accent only where hierarchy needs it.
referenceStyle.typography: Clean sans-serif close to Google Docs output: large centered cover title, compact table text, restrained section headings.
layoutRules: Use generous margins and high whitespace.
Use thin table rules and boxed header rows.
Avoid dark web styling, heavy backgrounds, decorative cards, and dense graphic effects.
Use certification logos small and aligned to rows; use text badges when logos are missing.
Keep every product row traceable to the page 610 matrix.

excludedBodies.name: Laboratorio Oficial J.M. Madariaga
excludedBodies.reason: No certification entries in source matrix.

nextStepBuildRules: Create tmp/pdfs/certifications-guide/image-cache for WEBP and SVG conversions before embedding images.
Use ReportLab to build the A4 PDF under output/pdf/.
Render the PDF pages to tmp/pdfs/certifications-guide/rendered with pdftoppm and visually inspect for clipping or overlap.
Do not include LOM/Madariaga in the active certification-body legend.
Include PLD as a product row with the text No listed certification in the source table.
